steps.title: Identify the result
steps.content: The first sentence says the South Side Community Art Center has cultivated a multigenerational community of Black creatives since 1941. The second says it has gained a reputation as a Black art and culture hub.

steps.title: Choose a consequence signal
steps.content: A and B signal contrast, but the reputation follows naturally from the center's long cultivation of creatives. C signals frequency and does not connect the ideas logically. The transition should signal a consequence. The answer is D.
